name: toast
title: Toast
description: Imperative toast notification system. Use toast.success()/error()/warning()/info() to show toasts. Place <ToastContainer /> once at the app root.

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Toast. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.
Used internally by Toast. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.

consumption.notes: Place <ToastContainer /> once at app root. Then call toast.success("Done!") anywhere.
